final_prompt.prompt:
Create a technical infographic showing a detailed exploded-view breakdown of the Sony A7 camera with all components labeled by name.

Style/medium: clean technical illustration with precise line work and clear labeling system
Composition: exploded-view diagram with camera body at center, components radiating outward in logical assembly order, numbered callouts connecting parts to labels
Subject: Sony A7 camera deconstructed into all major and minor components: body shell, sensor assembly, shutter mechanism, IBIS unit, viewfinder, LCD screen, battery compartment, card slot, lens mount, buttons, dials, circuit boards, connectors, screws, and internal structural elements
Scene/backdrop: neutral white or light gray technical background with subtle grid for scale reference
Lighting/mood: even studio lighting for maximum clarity and technical accuracy
Color palette: neutral grays and blacks for camera components, high-contrast accent colors for labels and callout lines
Materials/textures: brushed metal, matte plastic, glass elements, rubber grips rendered with technical precision
Text (verbatim): Sony, A7, and all component names in Spanish as listed in the original query
Constraints: all parts must be visually distinct and identifiable, labels must be legible, exploded spacing must show relationships without losing part identification
Avoid: artistic flourishes, dramatic lighting, cluttered overlapping parts, illegible small text, missing component labels
